opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up and could barely open my eyes because they are so swollen, my legs feel like tight water balloons, and my urine is entirely foam.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The swelling has come on fast over the last week and now I'm so swollen and worn out I can barely get out of bed, and I get a bit short of breath when I lie flat.

symptom_narrative.onset: the swelling started building up over the past week and got a lot worse in the last couple of days
symptom_narrative.duration: about a week, worse each day
symptom_narrative.character: puffy, swollen face and eyes, worst first thing in the morning; both legs swollen and shiny and they dent when I press them; my belly feels bloated and tight; and my pee is really frothy and foamy
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've ever felt — my eyes are almost swollen shut and I feel completely wiped out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my face and eyes, both legs up past the knees to the thighs, and my belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the face is worst in the mornings; the leg and belly swelling is there all the time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps; propping myself up on pillows lets me breathe a bit easier at night
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat makes me a bit short of breath
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really tired and lethargic, a bit breathless when I lie down, and I've put on about 6 kilos in ten days
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, I can't see properly because of the swelling around my eyes, and my legs are so heavy and swollen it's hard to move

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse, who is here helping and made the call; currently bedbound because of the swelling and exhaustion

objective_data_offered.value: face and eyelids very puffy, eyes swollen almost to slits
both legs swollen and shiny; the skin stays dented for a moment when pressed; swelling goes up past the knees
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/carer demonstrating over video; depth and extent of pitting cannot be graded remotely

objective_data_offered.value: urine is very frothy and foamy, like the head on a beer, every time I go
put on about 6 kg in ten days; home scales read about 88 kg this morning
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-weighed on a home bathroom scale, not calibrated

objective_data_offered.value: mild breathlessness when lying flat, eased by propping up on pillows; no breathlessness sitting up at rest
